overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit covered arcade, crossing a street under an overpass, and emerging onto a rainy waterfront promenade at night. The clip transitions from enclosed urban corridors with cyan and red neon lighting to an open palm-tree lined waterfront with a flying vehicle passing overhead.

bright cyan and pink neon signs illuminating shop fronts along the left wall
green metal railings lining the right side of the walkway
smooth grey concrete pavement with subtle reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban arcade with the visible player character walking forward. Cyan neon signs glow on the left shop fronts while green railings line the right side. The ceiling stretches into the distance with geometric concrete panels, creating a sheltered corridor with no other pedestrians visible.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway with the character no longer visible in frame, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera and passing by on the right side

large digital screen displaying animated advertisements on the left wall
large white rectangular planter containing a small tree
yellow safety railings replacing the green ones along the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the covered walkway where the character model is no longer visible. The scene features vending machines and digital billboards on the left, a planter with a tree on the right, and a single pedestrian walking toward and past the camera. The corridor remains neon-lit and enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered intersection under concrete overpass with vehicle traffic

events.description: black sedan drives past from right to left across the crosswalk
transitioning from enclosed walkway to open intersection area under the overpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the street under the red-lit overpass while vehicles pass through the intersection

rows of red neon tubes lining the ceiling beams of the overpass
dark asphalt road with lane markings and crosswalk lines
bold yellow striped crosswalk markings on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass illuminated by red neon lights. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as a black sedan drives past. The environment shifts from enclosed corridor to open road under the grid-like overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with blue fluorescent lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts dramatically from warm red neon to cool blue fluorescent
turning right into a darker underpass corridor

agents.ego_description: turning right into a blue-lit underpass area with concrete walls, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking through the blue-lit underpass ahead of the camera

entered.detail: long horizontal fluorescent tubes emitting bright cyan-blue light along the ceiling
smooth dark concrete walls of the underpass corridor
low concrete ceiling with integrated blue lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrow underpass where the lighting shifts from red to cool blue fluorescent. Concrete walls enclose the space, and a few pedestrians are visible walking ahead in the distance. The environment feels more confined and utilitarian compared to the previous open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees overlooking ocean

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into open waterfront area with visible sky and ocean
large flying advertising blimp appears in the night sky above the palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with palm trees, approaching the ocean overlook

notable_agents.action: walking along the waterfront path near the railing

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky lining the promenade
dark ocean water visible beyond the waterfront railing
dark blue night sky with visible moon and scattered clouds
large hovering vehicle with illuminated advertising screens on its side
tall futuristic skyscrapers with lit windows visible in the distance
metal railing separating the promenade from the ocean drop

segments.scene_description: The scene opens dramatically to a wide waterfront promenade with tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky. The camera moves along the wet pavement toward the ocean railing, with a futuristic city skyline visible to the left. A large flying advertising blimp hovers in the sky, and the moon shines above the calm ocean waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit urban corridor into an expansive, rainy waterfront promenade at night. It begins inside a covered arcade where cyan neon signs and green railings line a geometric concrete walkway, moving past vending machines and digital billboards as a lone pedestrian crosses the path. The scene then opens into a wide intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass bathed in red light, crossing a yellow-striped street as a black sedan drives past. The camera turns right, momentarily tightening into a utilitarian underpass with cool blue fluorescent lighting and distant pedestrians before finally emerging onto a wide promenade. This final transition reveals a skyline of futuristic buildings and silhouetted palm trees, moving across wet pavement toward the ocean railing under a moonlit sky and a hovering advertising blimp.
